source: Wave 3.1 remediation guidance. DRAFT until human-reviewed - determination table and drafts in docs/REMEDIATION_REVIEW.md. No PowerShell anywhere in this file (Wave 3.1 B1): grounded checks carry short portal-first guidance naming the key decision; not-grounded checks carry portal path + Learn link only. Display-only text - this tool never executes remediation.

LABELS-01.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Information protection > Sensitivity labels

LABELS-02.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Information protection > Label publishing policies > Publish label

LABELS-03.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Information protection > Auto-labeling > select the simulation policy > Turn on policy

LABELS-04.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Information protection > Sensitivity labels > Create a label > scope it to Groups & sites

DLP-01.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Data loss prevention > Policies > select the test-mode policy > Turn the policy on

DLP-02.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Data loss prevention > Policies > select each policy > Edit locations > add Teams chat and channel messages

DLP-03.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Settings > Device onboarding (onboard devices first), then Data loss prevention > Policies > add the Devices location

DLP-04.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Data classification > Sensitive info types - confirm which named-entity detectors are active at the tenant's service plan

RET-01.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Data lifecycle management > Retention policies

RET-02.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Data lifecycle management > Adaptive scopes > Create scope, then retarget retention policies to adaptive scopes

RET-03.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Data lifecycle management > Label policies > Auto-apply a label

IRM-01.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Insider risk management > Policies > Create policy

IRM-02.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Insider risk management > Policies > Create policy > Data theft by departing users template - after HR/Legal alignment and licensing are settled

IRM-03.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Insider risk management > Policies > Create policy > Risky AI usage template

AUD-01.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Audit > select the 'Start recording user and admin activity' banner

AUD-02.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Audit > New search - confirm recent events return results (enabled is not the same as ingesting on time)

AUD-03.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Audit - review Audit (Premium) retention policies where the tenant tier includes them

ED-02.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > eDiscovery - Premium capabilities (holds, analytics, review sets) surface once the tenant tier includes them

CC-01.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Communication compliance > Policies > Create policy

AI-01.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > DSPM for AI

AI-02.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Data loss prevention > Policies > select the Copilot-scoped policy > Turn the policy on

AI-03.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Data loss prevention > Policies > create or edit a policy on the Microsoft 365 Copilot location with a rule referencing sensitivity labels

AI-04.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > DSPM for AI - collection policies (pay-as-you-go / Agent 365 billing applies)

AI-05.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Data lifecycle management > Retention policies > New retention policy - include the Microsoft 365 Copilot experiences location

AI-06.portalPath: Microsoft Purview portal > Communication compliance > Policies > Create policy > 'Detect Microsoft 365 Copilot interactions' template
